rankMathScoreHints: Focus keyword in SEO title (near start), H1, first 10% of content, meta description, URL slug
Meta description 140–160 chars with focus keyword + benefit + brand
Use 1 H1; keep H2–H4 budget (max 3 each) for clean outline
Include disclaimer for YMYL (food supplements are not medicines)
OG + Twitter cards filled from openGraph/twitter blocks
